inspire.en: After the last Action step in a battle round, pick up to X friendly fighters, where X is the combined Bounty characteristics of slain enemy fighters and enemy fighters in enemy and neutral territory. Inspire those friendly fighters.

name.en: In the Name of the King!

rulesText.en:
Once per battle round, in your Power step, if your leader ({icon:leader}) is on the battlefield, you can use 1 of the following abilities:
• Pick a friendly fighter. Inspire that fighter.
• Pick a slain friendly fighter. Raise them and place them in an empty edge hex.
If you are the underdog ({icon:skull}), you can use both abilities instead.

flavorText.en: It is the duty of every righteous warrior to serve as protector of the peasantry, and a shield against evil. No foe shall break the cordon!

rulesText.en: Each time you make a Save roll for a friendly fighter in friendly territory, you can re-roll 1 dice in that roll.

flavorText.en: Hark! The horns are sounded, and proclamations made – the kingdom must be scoured of beasts and ne'er-do-wells. None can escape royal justice!

rulesText.en: Friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice if the target of the Attack is damaged.

flavorText.en: It is in the moments of direst peril, when all that is chivalrous and pure stands threatens, that true heroes are made. And the victory feast will surely be spectacular...

rulesText.en: You can use the 'In the Name of the King!' ability twice this battle round instead of once.
